title: Turned salad into rent money
note: Mika somehow flipped a Moon Melon and Ruby Tomato into a Royal Orchid. The lobby went silent.

title: Paid luxury price for discount soup
note: Rafa traded Frost Berry for Solar Mango plus Glow Carrot and immediately asked if the server was lagging.

title: The mushroom heist
note: Adi walked in with Void Flytrap and walked out with Nebula Mushroom. Someone check their trading license.
